## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard Jess to Atlas workflow and pipeline for AfterShoot client content creation](https://fathom.video/share/v1-B8hZNDsqGD_zTdXKdbsQ6Wxs42BPt?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on setting up artifacts (personas, context, guidelines) as top priority](https://fathom.video/share/v1-B8hZNDsqGD_zTdXKdbsQ6Wxs42BPt?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
  - [Use pipelines to generate content, starting with article generation](https://fathom.video/share/v1-B8hZNDsqGD_zTdXKdbsQ6Wxs42BPt?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Spend most time on brief and outline stages for best results](https://fathom.video/share/v1-B8hZNDsqGD_zTdXKdbsQ6Wxs42BPt?tab=summary&timestamp=2079.0)
  - [Leverage AI tools (Claude, etc.) to assist in creating detailed artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/v1-B8hZNDsqGD_zTdXKdbsQ6Wxs42BPt?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)

## Topics

### Artifact Setup

  - [Personas: Created detailed photographer personas using AI assistance](https://fathom.video/share/v1-B8hZNDsqGD_zTdXKdbsQ6Wxs42BPt?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
  - [Company Context: Generated comprehensive profile of AfterShoot](https://fathom.video/share/v1-B8hZNDsqGD_zTdXKdbsQ6Wxs42BPt?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)
  - [Writing Guidelines: Need expansion with more do's/don'ts and examples](https://fathom.video/share/v1-B8hZNDsqGD_zTdXKdbsQ6Wxs42BPt?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)
  - [CTAs: To be filled out separately (lower priority)](https://fathom.video/share/v1-B8hZNDsqGD_zTdXKdbsQ6Wxs42BPt?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)

### Pipeline Walkthrough

  - [Article Generation: Main focus for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/v1-B8hZNDsqGD_zTdXKdbsQ6Wxs42BPt?tab=summary&timestamp=1842.0)
  - [Key steps: Assignment Brief \> Research \> Outline \> Draft \> Fact Check](https://fathom.video/share/v1-B8hZNDsqGD_zTdXKdbsQ6Wxs42BPt?tab=summary&timestamp=1886.0)
  - [Emphasis on editing brief and outline for best results](https://fathom.video/share/v1-B8hZNDsqGD_zTdXKdbsQ6Wxs42BPt?tab=summary&timestamp=2069.0)
  - [Demonstrated how to refine outputs at each stage](https://fathom.video/share/v1-B8hZNDsqGD_zTdXKdbsQ6Wxs42BPt?tab=summary&timestamp=2286.0)

### SEO Considerations

  - [Client has specific keyword preferences](https://fathom.video/share/v1-B8hZNDsqGD_zTdXKdbsQ6Wxs42BPt?tab=summary&timestamp=2340.0)
  - [Can input custom keywords in brief or direction field](https://fathom.video/share/v1-B8hZNDsqGD_zTdXKdbsQ6Wxs42BPt?tab=summary&timestamp=2366.0)
  - [May need to manually adjust keyword sections in brief](https://fathom.video/share/v1-B8hZNDsqGD_zTdXKdbsQ6Wxs42BPt?tab=summary&timestamp=2402.0)

### Editing and Refinement

  - [Can edit directly in rich text outputs](https://fathom.video/share/v1-B8hZNDsqGD_zTdXKdbsQ6Wxs42BPt?tab=summary&timestamp=2854.0)
  - [Use AI tools to condense/refine sections as needed](https://fathom.video/share/v1-B8hZNDsqGD_zTdXKdbsQ6Wxs42BPt?tab=summary&timestamp=2216.0)
  - [Focus on making content concise and relevant](https://fathom.video/share/v1-B8hZNDsqGD_zTdXKdbsQ6Wxs42BPt?tab=summary&timestamp=2221.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Review and refine AfterShoot artifacts (personas, context, guidelines)](https://fathom.video/share/v1-B8hZNDsqGD_zTdXKdbsQ6Wxs42BPt?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)
  - [Start running topics through the pipeline to identify issues](https://fathom.video/share/v1-B8hZNDsqGD_zTdXKdbsQ6Wxs42BPt?tab=summary&timestamp=1864.0)
  - [Practice editing and refining outputs at each stage](https://fathom.video/share/v1-B8hZNDsqGD_zTdXKdbsQ6Wxs42BPt?tab=summary&timestamp=2854.0)
  - [Reach out to Daryl (pod director) for guidance on photography specifics](https://fathom.video/share/v1-B8hZNDsqGD_zTdXKdbsQ6Wxs42BPt?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)
  - [Watch for upcoming full walkthrough video from Matt](https://fathom.video/share/v1-B8hZNDsqGD_zTdXKdbsQ6Wxs42BPt?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
